title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 523.090 - Who may have damages ascertained — proceedings
text:
523.090.  Who may have damages ascertained — proceedings. — In case property is to be, will be, or has been by any corporation damaged for public use, any person interested may have such damages ascertained.  The proceedings for ascertaining and paying such damages shall be the same as are and may be provided by law for assessing damages which owners of land may sustain in consequence of its appropriation for railroad purposes.
(RSMo 1939 § 1511) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1347; 1919 § 1798; 1909 § 2367
